title: Requirements phase: ap-ai-coding-agent
description: Hone requirements for the ap AI coding agent project

title: Answer Q5: edit tool multiple-match behavior
description: Answer Q5 about edit tool behavior when old_text appears multiple times

title: Design draft: ap-ai-coding-agent
description: Synthesize Q&A into requirements.md and design.md

title: Design review: ap-ai-coding-agent
description: Adversarial review of design.md for ap-ai-coding-agent

title: Research: ap-ai-coding-agent
description: Explorer phase: ground design in codebase reality, document patterns and constraints

title: Planning: ap-ai-coding-agent implementation plan
description: Create implementation plan from approved design

title: Task Writing: ap-ai-coding-agent
description: Convert implementation plan into code task files and materialize Step 1 wave

title: Impl: Cargo.toml + Project Scaffold
description: Create ap/ Rust project with all deps, main.rs with clap version flag, ap.toml.example, .gitignore

title: Task 02: Config System
description: Implement ap.toml config loading with serde, defaults, merge global + project config. Backed by .agents/scratchpad/implementation/ap-ai-coding-agent/tasks/task-02-config-system.code-task.md

title: Tool trait + 4 built-in tools
description: Implement Tool trait (BoxFuture, object-safe), ToolResult, ToolRegistry, and all 4 built-in tools (read, write, edit, bash) with 12 unit tests. EditTool errors on multi-match. BashTool no timeout.

title: Provider Trait + Bedrock Implementation
description: Implement Provider trait in src/provider/mod.rs and BedrockProvider in src/provider/bedrock.rs. Streaming API, StreamEvent enum, MockProvider support. See .agents/scratchpad/implementation/ap-ai-coding-agent/tasks/task-04-provider-trait-bedrock.code-task.md

title: Step 05: Hooks system
description: Implement HookRunner with pre_tool_call, post_tool_call, run_observer_hook. TDD: 6 tests. Backing file: .agents/scratchpad/implementation/ap-ai-coding-agent/tasks/task-05-hooks-system.code-task.md

title: impl:ap:step-06:extensions-system
description: Implement Rhai scripting + dylib extension loading system. ExtensionLoader discovers ~/.ap/extensions/ and ./.ap/extensions/, loads .rhai scripts as RhaiTool<Box<dyn Tool>>, loads .dylib/.so via libloading. Registry collects tools/hooks/panels/message_interceptors. 5+ unit tests.

title: Step 07: Agent Loop
description: Implement AgentLoop in src/app.rs — conversation state, streaming LLM, tool dispatch, hook integration, MockProvider integration tests. See .agents/scratchpad/implementation/ap-ai-coding-agent/tasks/task-07-agent-loop.code-task.md

title: pdd:ap-ai-coding-agent:step-08: Session Persistence
description: Implement src/session/mod.rs and src/session/store.rs. See .agents/scratchpad/implementation/ap-ai-coding-agent/tasks/task-08-session-persistence.code-task.md

title: Implement Ratatui TUI (Step 9)
description: Implement src/tui/mod.rs, src/tui/ui.rs, src/tui/events.rs. TuiApp struct with async tokio::select! event loop, ratatui layout (status bar, conversation pane, tool panel, input box), Normal/Insert mode state machine, /help overlay. Manual smoke test gate. See .agents/scratchpad/implementation/ap-ai-coding-agent/tasks/task-09-ratatui-tui.code-task.md

title: Remove extensions system (design.amendment)
description: Delete src/extensions/, remove rhai+libloading from Cargo.toml, clean up main.rs/app.rs references. design.amendment: plugin systems are obsolete in the agent era. Backing task: .agents/scratchpad/implementation/ap-ai-coding-agent/tasks/task-10-remove-extensions-cleanup.code-task.md

title: Non-interactive mode (-p flag)
description: Implement ap -p flag for headless/scripting mode. See task-10-non-interactive-mode.code-task.md

title: Write README.md
description: Write complete, accurate README.md for ap. Covers installation, quick start, AWS setup, config reference, tools, hooks, sessions, TUI keybindings, non-interactive mode. No extensions docs (removed). See task-11-readme.code-task.md.

title: Validate ap-ai-coding-agent implementation
description: Final validation: tests, build, lint, E2E

title: Commit: ap-ai-coding-agent implementation complete
description: Commit metadata/tracking files after validation passed
